title: Reserve Compute Resources for System Daemons — Node Allocatable
text:
'Allocatable' on a Kubernetes node is defined as the amount of compute resources
that are available for pods. The scheduler does not over-subscribe
'Allocatable'. 'CPU', 'memory' and 'ephemeral-storage' are supported as of now.
Node Allocatable is exposed as part of
v1.Node
object in the API and as part
of
kubectl describe node
in the CLI.
Resources can be reserved for two categories of system daemons in the
kubelet
.
